summary: Good recording of a patchy show with mixed performance quality
review: The fan notes that the audio capture is good, but the concert itself was very uneven, featuring many problems alongside some strong renditions. While the soundboard (or source) sounds satisfactory, the overall performance receives a mixed appraisal.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; recording praised as good while the show is described as patchy with both problems and highlights, leading to an overall moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a good recording with no specific issues mentioned; clarity and mix appear satisfactory.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
